# Chapter 18: Mathematical modelling: real problem to math  (~100 pp)
- 18.1 What modelling is (10)
- 18.2 Choosing what to keep and what to throw away (15)
- 18.3 Identification and validation (15)
- 18.4 Parameter estimation (12)
- 18.5 Model uncertainty and structural error (12)
- 18.6 Worked example: from a measurement notebook (Volume I) to a model and back (15)
- 18.7 Worked example: a biological system, a financial system, a structural system (15)
- 18.8 Failure section: models that fooled their builders (6)

**Archetype**: ethics (responsible modelling). **Project**: take one of the reader's measurements from Volume I and turn it into a model. Defend the modelling choices in a 5-page write-up. **Exercises**: 25.
